Enumeration# CVImageBufferOriginPosition

### [Enumeration Cases](/documentation/corevideo/cvimagebufferoriginposition#Enumeration-Cases)

[`case bottomLeft`](/documentation/corevideo/cvimagebufferoriginposition/bottomleft)Origin is located at lower left corner of the image[`case topLeft`](/documentation/corevideo/cvimagebufferoriginposition/topleft)Origin is located at upper left corner of the image## [Relationships](/documentation/corevideo/cvimagebufferoriginposition#relationships)
